TestControlPlane._comment: JEB-1502: fail-closed to 404 by default. Enable ONLY via TestControlPlane__Enabled=true env var in a non-production test harness environment, never committed true. SharedSecret must be set via env var (TestControlPlane__SharedSecret) — never committed.

DurableRequests._comment: SPINE-FOUNDATION / ADR-006. Default false = today's green in-memory create path (S05 H3 -> 201, S01-S04 unchanged). Flip to true ONLY after state-service saga_bundles + delivery POST /api/v1/deliveries are deployed and smoke-passed, staging-first, via FeatureFlags__DurableRequests__Enabled=true.

UseUpstream._comment_payments: JEB-1484 / GR3 — route the cash-settlement ledger post THROUGH UPG (generic /api/v1/payments/settlements/record) instead of the in-process ledger. DEFAULT-OFF: flip to true ONLY after UPG's owner-gated JEB-1484 PR is approved + deployed and Services:UnifiedPayment:BaseUrl is set. While off the gateway keeps the in-memory ledger (instant rollback target).

Heartbeat._comment: S06 / ADR-HB-001 — presence cutover to the NEW reusable heart-beat service. Default OFF: the availability surface keeps using the delivery-service presence wire. Flip via FeatureFlags__Heartbeat__Enabled=true once heart-beat is live. roleKey is the OPAQUE consumer namespace heart-beat stores but never interprets.
Heartbeat._comment_serviceAuthKey: S06 AUTH CONTRACT — static X-Service-Auth-Key presented to heart-beat. SECRET — committed BLANK; inject via FeatureFlags__Heartbeat__ServiceAuthKey (== heart-beat's HEARTBEAT_SERVICE_AUTH_KEY). Do NOT enable the flag where this is blank.

Features._comment: DevEndpoints gates the additive /dev/* test-harness routes (DevController). MUST stay false in every committed appsettings; the routes return 404 when off. Flip on ONLY via env var Features__DevEndpoints__Enabled=true in the seeding-harness environment. The gateway never auto-seeds.
Features._comment_swagger: Swagger gates the admin-role-gated /swagger* OpenAPI surface (Program.cs). MUST stay false in every committed appsettings; /swagger* returns 404 when off. Flip on ONLY via env var Features__Swagger__Enabled=true (deploy-to-jeeb.yml swagger_ui input). When ON it is admin-role-gated (non-admin => 404) — NEVER the open Dev/Testing branch. jeeb.fds-1.com is PUBLIC.

Auth._comment: Auth:Otp configures the production phone sign-in OTP orchestration (AuthOtpController, /v1/auth/otp/*). ApplicationId is the Jeeb tenant's application id in the shared one-time-password service, forwarded on every SendOTP/ValidateOTP (the service keys Phone rows by application id). Set per env; the committed default is an empty placeholder. ttlSeconds is the contract constant the gateway surfaces on request (the service does not return a TTL).

Kyc._comment: kyc-service (S03/ADR-0004) is NOT yet deployed — repo+DB owner/SSH ESCALATED. PLACEHOLDER BaseUrl; FeatureFlags:UseUpstream:Kyc stays false until the service ships (suggested host port 10074).

HeartBeat._comment: heart-beat (S06 / ADR-HB-001) — NEW reusable presence service (Go + Redis). NOT YET DEPLOYED: PLACEHOLDER BaseUrl (port UNVERIFIED — confirm against the live fleet port map before creating the swarm service). FeatureFlags:Heartbeat:Enabled stays false until the service ships and is smoke-passed.

CancellationPolicy._comment: JEB-1507: configurable thresholds for the Jeeber progressive-ban cancellation policy. WeeklyThreshold: max cancellations within WeeklyWindowDays before restriction is applied. StrikeThreshold: reserved for future progressive-ban escalation. RestrictionDurationHours: how long the Jeeber is restricted after tripping WeeklyThreshold.
